Let me explore the workspace to understand what this project is about.Let me also read some of the component files to get more context about what the project is about.Now I have a good picture of what this project is. Let me summarize it for the user.**Cart Boy Consulting (CBC)** is a single-page marketing/course website built with:

- **Next.js** (v16) + **TypeScript** + **Tailwind CSS v4**
- Deployed via **Cloudflare** using `@opennextjs/cloudflare`

**What it's about:** It's a consulting/training brand aimed at golf course "cart boys" (outside ops staff). The site sells the idea of a 7-module course teaching entry-level golf course workers how to maximize tips and perform their job professionally — covering everything from showing up to work looking sharp, to mastering "the turn" (the pivotal moment between the front and back nine where tips are made).

**Page structure:**
| Component | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Navbar` | Navigation |
| `Hero` | Hook — "Hustle. Effort. Good Attitude." |
| `WhoWeAre` | Credibility — founder story, method, mission |
| `WhyItWorks` | Value proposition |
| `Modules` | 7 course modules breakdown |
| `Takeaway` | Closing CTA section |
| `Footer` | Footer |

The visual design is dark-themed with a green accent color palette fitting the golf aesthetic.
